subcodes.first_line: O illumined daughter! Thy letter was received. I shall pray that thy character may become divine and thy conduct [likewise] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر نورانی نامه تو رسید در حق تو دعا نمایم که اخلاقت ربانی گردد و رفتارت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
